# Tecorbitron Solutions Pvt. Ltd. — llms.txt

> Tecorbitron Solutions Private Limited is a founder-led IT services company based in Ghaziabad, NCR, India, building websites, mobile apps, e-commerce stores, and SEO-driven growth for startups, SMBs, and international clients — with AI and cloud integration included as standard, not as an add-on.

Founded in August 2024 by Sagar Chauhan (Founder & CEO), Tecorbitron is MCA-registered (CIN: U62011UP2024PTC207353), GST and MSME registered, and serves clients across India and internationally. It positions itself between unreliable freelancers and expensive large agencies — premium-quality output at accessible pricing — and has delivered 120+ projects for 100+ clients across 30+ industries. Tagline: "We Build Bold."

## Company

- Legal name: Tecorbitron Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
- Founded: 5 August 2024
- Founder & CEO: Sagar Chauhan
- Website: https://www.tecorbitron.com
- Email: contact@tecorbitron.com
- Phone: +91-9084800496
- Address: S9, Angel Mega Mall, Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh 201010, India
- Area served: India and International
- Languages: English, Hindi
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/tecorbitrons
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tecorbitron
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tecorbitron
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Tecorbitron
- Founder LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nssagarrajput

## What We Do

Tecorbitron builds digital products and services for startups and growing
businesses. Every engagement includes 3 months of post-delivery support and
transparent pricing. Four core service categories:

1. Web Development — fast, conversion-focused sites and web apps
2. App Development — Android, iOS, and cross-platform mobile apps
3. E-Commerce Development — Shopify, WooCommerce, or fully custom stores
4. SEO & Digital Marketing — technical, on-page, and content SEO

## Services

- [Web Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services/web-development): Websites and web applications on Next.js/React, built to load fast, rank well, and convert visitors.
- [App Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services/app-development): Android, iOS, and cross-platform mobile apps, from early-stage MVPs to full-featured products.
- [E-Commerce Development](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services/ecommerce-development): Online stores on Shopify, WooCommerce, or fully custom builds — fast, focused, easy to manage.
- [SEO & Digital Growth](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services/seo-and-marketing): Technical, on-page, and content SEO that turns organic search into qualified leads.
- [All Services](https://www.tecorbitron.com/services): Full service lineup, transparent pricing, and 3 months of post-launch support included on every project.

## Solutions & Stack

- [Solutions](https://www.tecorbitron.com/solutions): Custom builds by business need — CRM, ERP, LMS, hospital/school management systems, real estate portals, AI chatbots — browsable by service, industry, platform, and cloud/AI capability.
- [Technologies](https://www.tecorbitron.com/technologies): The frontend, backend, mobile, database, cloud, and AI stack used across projects.
